languages.text: "Обычный экипаж корабля раньше почти не был протезирован. Наши главные лекарства — пила и молитва Богу-Императору. Но под вашим благородным управлением все изменилось, и люди из сектора Бионика с нами согласны!"

traits.locale_text: "Обычный экипаж корабля раньше почти не был хорошо протезирован. Наши главные лекарства — пила и молитва Богу-Императору. Но под вашим благородным управлением все изменилось, и люди из секора Бионика с нами согласны!"

languages.text: "Ordinary crew members have seldom been furnished with prosthetics before! A saw and a prayer to the God-Emperor — those were our two main treatments. But things have changed under your noble rule, and the people of the Sector Bionica agree with us!"
languages.original_text: "Обычный экипаж корабля раньше почти не был протезирован. Наши главные лекарства — пила и молитва Богу-Императору. Но под вашим благородным управлением все изменилось, и люди из сектора Бионика с нами согласны!"

traits.locale_text: "Ordinary crew members have seldom been furnished with prosthetics before! A saw and a prayer to the God-Emperor — those were our two main treatments. But things have changed under your noble rule, and the people of the Sector Bionica agree with us!"

"Ordinary crew members have seldom been furnished with prosthetics before! A saw and a prayer to the God-Emperor — those were our two main treatments. But things have changed under your noble rule, and the people of the Sector Bionica agree with us!"

"Ordinary crew members have never been so well furnished with prosthetics! A saw and a prayer to the God-Emperor — those were our two main treatments. But things have changed under your noble rule, and the people of the Sector Bionica agree with us!"

"Ordinary crew members have seldom been furnished with prosthetics before! A saw and a prayer to the God-Emperor — those were our two main treatments. But things have changed under your noble rule, and the people of the Sector Bionica agree with us!"

"Ordinary crew members have seldom been furnished with prosthetics before! A saw and a prayer to the God-Emperor — those were our two main treatments. But things have changed under your noble rule, and the people of the Sector Bionica agree with us!"

languages.text: 「普通の人たちは、今までにないほど義肢を備えていますね！ノコギリと皇帝神への祈りが、我々の主な治療法でした。しかし、貴方の高貴な統治下では、状況が変わりました。そして、セクター・ビオニカの人々も、我々の意見に賛成しています！」
languages.original_text: "Ordinary crew members have never been so well furnished with prosthetics! A saw and a prayer to the God-Emperor — those were our two main treatments. But things have changed under your noble rule, and the people of the Sector Bionica agree with us!"

languages.text: "Sıradan mürettebat mensupları, daha önce nadiren protez alıyordu! Testereler ve Tanrı İmparator'a dualarımız. Bunlar bizim iki ana tedavimizdi. Fakat sizin soylu yönetiminiz altında işler değişti. Sektör Biyonika'dakiler de bizimle aynı fikirde!"
languages.original_text: "Ordinary crew members have seldom been furnished with prosthetics before! A saw and a prayer to the God-Emperor — those were our two main treatments. But things have changed under your noble rule, and the people of the Sector Bionica agree with us!"

traits.locale_text: "Sıradan mürettebat mensupları, daha önce nadiren protez alıyordu! Testereler ve Tanrı İmparator'a dualarımız. Bunlar bizim iki ana tedavimizdi. Fakat sizin soylu yönetiminiz altında işler değişti. Sektör Biyonika'dakiler de bizimle aynı fikirde!"

languages.text: “普通船员此前几乎没有装配过义体！一把骨锯、一句向神皇的祷词，就是对他们来说仅有的治疗手段。但在您仁善的治下，一切已然不同，仿生区的同仁全都赞同我们的做法！”
languages.original_text: "Ordinary crew members have seldom been furnished with prosthetics before! A saw and a prayer to the God-Emperor — those were our two main treatments. But things have changed under your noble rule, and the people of the Sector Bionica agree with us!"

traits.locale_text: “普通船员此前几乎没有装配过义体！一把骨锯、一句向神皇的祷词，就是对他们来说仅有的治疗手段。但在您仁善的治下，一切已然不同，仿生区的同仁全都赞同我们的做法！”

languages.text: "Gewöhnliche Crewmitglieder wurden früher nur selten mit Prothesen ausgestattet! Eine Säge und ein Gebet zum Gottimperator ... mehr hatten wir meist nicht. Aber unter Eurer edlen Herrschaft haben sich die Dinge verändert. Das sehen auch die Bewohner des Sektors Bionica so!"
languages.original_text: "Ordinary crew members have seldom been furnished with prosthetics before! A saw and a prayer to the God-Emperor — those were our two main treatments. But things have changed under your noble rule, and the people of the Sector Bionica agree with us!"

traits.locale_text: "Gewöhnliche Crewmitglieder wurden früher nur selten mit Prothesen ausgestattet! Eine Säge und ein Gebet zum Gottimperator ... mehr hatten wir meist nicht. Aber unter Eurer edlen Herrschaft haben sich die Dinge verändert. Das sehen auch die Bewohner des Sektors Bionica so!"

languages.text: « Les petites gens qui servent à votre bord ont rarement été pourvus en prothèses ! Une scie et une prière à l'Empereur-Dieu, tels étaient jusque-là les seuls traitements auxquels nous avions droit. Mais sous votre noble direction, les choses ont changé, et le personnel du secteur Bionica partage notre sentiment ! »
languages.original_text: "Ordinary crew members have seldom been furnished with prosthetics before! A saw and a prayer to the God-Emperor — those were our two main treatments. But things have changed under your noble rule, and the people of the Sector Bionica agree with us!"

traits.locale_text: « Les petites gens qui servent à votre bord ont rarement été pourvus en prothèses ! Une scie et une prière à l'Empereur-Dieu, tels étaient jusque-là les seuls traitements auxquels nous avions droit. Mais sous votre noble direction, les choses ont changé, et le personnel du secteur Bionica partage notre sentiment ! »

languages.text: «¡Los tripulantes normales casi nunca habíamos tenido acceso a las prótesis! Hasta ahora, nuestros principales tratamientos eran la sierra y las plegarias al Dios Emperador. Pero, bajo su noble mandato, las cosas han cambiado, ¡y la gente del Sector Bionica nos apoya!».
languages.original_text: "Ordinary crew members have seldom been furnished with prosthetics before! A saw and a prayer to the God-Emperor — those were our two main treatments. But things have changed under your noble rule, and the people of the Sector Bionica agree with us!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Los tripulantes normales casi nunca habíamos tenido acceso a las prótesis! Hasta ahora, nuestros principales tratamientos eran la sierra y las plegarias al Dios Emperador. Pero, bajo su noble mandato, las cosas han cambiado, ¡y la gente del Sector Bionica nos apoya!».
